title: CALL_ID constant with coupling warning comment prevents silent dispatch bugs
description: The CALL_ID constant ('r1') is defined once in mod.rs and shared between build_request and extract_response. The comment explicitly warns that both must be updated together and that extract_response must be extended before multi-call batching is added. A contributor might inline the string literal in each call site 'to simplify'. That would allow build_request and extract_response to silently diverge: one uses 'r1', the other uses 'r2', and the response is never found. The constant and the warning are a deliberate coupling contract.
